member.name: T:AdbSharp.Platform.Windows.Usb.WindowsUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver
member.summary: Resolves Windows processes that hold Android WinUSB interface handles.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Platform.Windows.Usb.WindowsUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Platform.Windows.Usb.WindowsUsbTransportFactory
member.summary: Windows USB provider backed by SetupAPI and WinUSB.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Platform.Windows.Usb.WindowsUsbTransportFactory.WindowsDevicePathRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
vid_(?<vid>[0-9a-f]{4})&pid_(?<pid>[0-9a-f]{4})(?:&mi_(?<mi>[0-9a-f]{2}))?#(?<serial>[^#\\]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match '_'.
○ "vid" capture group.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '&'.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match '_'.
○ "pid" capture group.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 4 times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '&'.
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match '_'.
○ "mi" capture group.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 2 times.
○ Match '#'.
○ "serial" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^#\\] atomically at least once.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the WindowsDevicePathRegex method.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.WindowsDevicePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.
